# Bean South Coffee
Fresh roasted, fair trade, USDA organic specialty coffee from Americus, Georgia.

## Products
- Dark Roast — 12oz, $19.95, available whole bean or ground drip
- Medium Roast — 12oz, $19.95, available whole bean or ground drip
- Decaf — 12oz, $19.95, available whole bean or ground drip

## About
Bean South Coffee is operated by Café Campesino, Georgia's first 100% fair trade and organic coffee roaster (25+ years). B Corp certified. Direct relationships with small farmer cooperatives in 14 countries.

## Pages
- Shop: /collections/coffee
- About Us: /pages/about-us
- Our Coffee: /pages/bean-south-coffee
- Best of the South Blog: /blogs/best-of-the-south

## Contact
